description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling rectangular footprint, featuring a low-pitched, dark gray gable roof. The exterior walls are clad in light brown brick, complemented by large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious patio area. The front of the house includes a driveway leading to an attached garage, while the backyard boasts a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and landscaped areas with several pink-blossomed trees. The patio is expansive, with outdoor seating and shaded areas, providing ample space for relaxation and entertainment. The windows are arranged in both grouped and individual patterns, allowing for abundant natural light. The overall design is modern and open, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story brick bungalow with a gable roof, large windows, attached garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and landscaped patio with pink-blossomed trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main patio area with the swimming pool, outdoor seating, and two prominent pink-blossomed trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the attached garage, driveway with a parked car, and the long expanse of the roof, with more trees visible on the side.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear facade with grouped windows, a long bench, and the garage entrance, as well as additional patio furniture and trees.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the side of the bungalow with the pool, patio, and a clear view of the roof's length, along with more landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows
